description: Nadia Kovalchuk owns and is accountable for the Month-End Financial Close workflow
Sarah Chen made the final call to choose Salesforce over HubSpot
The Salesforce CRM decision shapes the Sales Handoff to CS workflow — all handoff data lives in Salesforce
Salesforce is the system of record for renewal management; the CRM decision directly affects how renewals are tracked
Ravi Patel made the SSO commitment to Hartfield Group during renewal negotiation
The SSO commitment directly affects the Hartfield Group account relationship and health status
The Q1 2026 tech debt freeze directly blocked delivery of the SSO commitment to Hartfield
The tech debt freeze also put the Meridian Capital custom dashboard commitment at risk
James Okafor is the technical lead for the Finance Workflow Engine module
The Finance Workflow Engine is what Veridian customers use to run their Month-End Close workflows
Dev Anand owns the Customer Data Platform infrastructure and data quality
The Customer Data Platform produces the account health data used in QBR preparation
Priya Sharma owns the Customer Onboarding workflow (re-absorbed from dedicated team in 2023)
The decision to dissolve the Onboarding team and move responsibility to CS directly shaped the current onboarding workflow
Sarah Chen and Tom Adeyemi jointly decided to defer the self-serve tier — Tom as dissenting co-decider
The killed AI pilot for CS triage directly affects the current state of the CS ticket triage workflow — it explains why no AI tooling is in use
Yuki Tanaka owns the Engineering Runbook Library and is accountable for its coverage
The Runbook Library is the primary operational resource used during Production Incident Response
Chloe Beaumont maintains the informal Sales Commitment Log — a personal Notion doc that is the de facto commitment tracker
The deferred decision to build a proper commitment tracking system means Chloe's personal Notion doc remains the only record
Tom Adeyemi owns the Product Spec to Linear Ticket workflow
The Linear adoption decision determined the tooling for the spec-to-ticket workflow
Nadia Kovalchuk initiated and co-decided the AI evaluation for finance workflows
The decision to evaluate AI for finance is reshaping the Month-End Close workflow
The broken public roadmap commitment from Product is directly harming Priya Sharma's ability to run effective QBRs and renewals
Marcus Webb championed and made the final call on the Q1 2026 tech debt freeze
The Sales Handoff workflow produces the customer context that feeds into the Onboarding workflow
Fatima Al-Rashid co-decided to defer the commitment tracking system, a decision she now considers a mistake
Sarah Chen's personal CEO-level commitment to Hartfield escalates the stakes of the original SSO commitment (com-001)
Series B runway constraints made it impossible to simply hire more engineers, forcing the tech debt freeze as the only viable option
Chloe Beaumont is the named CSM for Hartfield Group
Chloe Beaumont is also the named CSM for Meridian Capital
The New Business Sales Process produces the closed deal that triggers the Sales Handoff to CS workflow
Contract Renewal Management directly produces the renewed ARR that extends the company's runway and Series B sustainability
James Okafor personally owns delivery of the Admin SSO Self-Serve interface as part of the tech debt freeze
Yuki Tanaka owns the Engineering Code Review workflow and sets review standards
Dev Anand owns Data Pipeline Monitoring and Incident Response
Nadia Kovalchuk owns the Invoice Reconciliation workflow
Yuki Tanaka owns Engineering Sprint Planning
Sarah Chen owns Annual Strategic Planning
Fatima Al-Rashid owns Cross-Functional Quarterly Planning as COO
The deferred commitment tracking system decision means quarterly planning commitments still go untracked after the meeting
Oliver Mwangi (VP Engineering) reports to Marcus Webb (CTO)
Yuki Tanaka now reports to Oliver Mwangi after dec-010 narrowed her scope
The external VP Engineering hire directly reduced Yuki Tanaka's organizational scope and changed her reporting line
Ben Osei owns the Intercom-Salesforce integration that causes the data quality issues in the CS ticket triage workflow
Imogen Walsh owns the Security and Compliance Review workflow
Carlos Mendez runs technical demos and security questionnaire responses as part of the new business sales process
Imogen Walsh is the legal reviewer in the New Business Sales Process — the #1 deal-slippage bottleneck
Sophie Laurent owns the Marketing Campaign Performance Review workflow
The split HubSpot/Salesforce stack decision (dec-011) is the root cause of the attribution gap that makes wf-017 painful
Wei Zhang owns the Customer Onboarding workflow — created specifically to fix the onboarding time regression from dec-003
The decision to create the Head of Customer Onboarding role (dec-012) directly created actor-019
dec-012 partially reverses dec-003 by re-creating dedicated onboarding ownership, though it was never framed as an admission of mistake
Kwame Asante is the practitioner who actually executes the 38-hour month-end close each month — Nadia owns it, Kwame does it
Kwame Asante handles day-to-day invoice reconciliation operations
Anya Volkov owns the New Employee Onboarding workflow
Oliver Mwangi made the runbook coverage commitment to Marcus Webb — a commitment that was subsequently broken
Sophie Laurent made the HubSpot-Salesforce attribution commitment to Sarah Chen
Sophie's attribution commitment (com-014) depends on Ben Osei doing the integration work — which is not yet scheduled
Amara Diallo was the PM on the failed 2024 CS triage AI pilot — she carries institutional memory of what went wrong
Amara Diallo (Senior PM — Platform) contributes to the Product Spec to Linear Ticket workflow for Finance Workflow Engine roadmap items
Oliver Mwangi now owns Engineering Sprint Planning as VP Engineering (previously Yuki's domain)
Imogen Walsh reviews contract terms in the Contract Renewal Management workflow when legal terms change
The Security and Compliance Review workflow is a gate within the New Business Sales Process — a cleared review unblocks the deal
